utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: God , I feel so guilty about Ross .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: I kinda feel like it is my fault .

emotion_cause.span: 3_I kinda feel like it is my fault .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Kind of ? If you just kept this to yourself none of this would have happened .

emotion_cause.span: 4_If you just kept this to yourself none of this would have happened .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Well , I am keeping so many things to myself these days , something was bound to slip out !

emotion_cause.span: 5_I am keeping so many things to myself these days

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Well , I think it is very brave what you said .

emotion_cause.span: 5_I am keeping so many things to myself these days , something was bound to slip out !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: All right , I can not sit here anymore . I have to walk places .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Pheebs , what are you doing with the coat ? How about the whole animal rights thing ?

emotion_cause.span: 8_what are you doing with the coat ? How about the whole animal rights thing ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Well , I have been reading up and for your information , minks are not very nice .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Okay , I ... it is the best thing I have ever had wrapped around me , including Phil Huntley !
